calibration_status: kappa_F=1 is an uncalibrated Version 1 placeholder; Faraday amplitudes are structural, not calibrated erbium predictions

canonical_context.power_exposure_note: The plotted quantities are noiseless intensities normalised to I0 and the dual-port normalised difference S, so probe power and exposure do not set the displayed values.

caption: Representative noiseless single-frame outputs of the reference condensate at |Delta|/2pi=1.5 GHz, imaged along x through the common NA=0.080 pupil. PCI, DGI, and dark-field Faraday panels show I/I0; the dual-port panel shows S=(I_H-I_V)/(I_H+I_V). Separate colour scales are required by the bright- and dark-background readouts. The Faraday panels use the uncalibrated Version 1 setting kappa_F=1. Camera noise and multishot evolution are not included.
figure_type: canonical noiseless finite-aperture single-frame readout comparison
pipeline: scalar phase and phenomenological Faraday rotation maps
PCI, DGI, dark-field Faraday, and dual-port Faraday readouts

plotted_quantities.DGI: noiseless image-plane intensity I/I0 with OD_s=4 residual carrier

port_mapping: I_H = historical notebook I_v; I_V = historical notebook I_u
